_comment: Accepted exceptions for direct semantic bindings that cannot be replaced with component tokens. Add an entry per component+variable pair. The raw scan still records all bindings; Health uses this list to compute actionableSemanticTotal.

exceptions.reason: Effect/shadow color on avatar add button. No avatar/* effect token published. Needs new token design decision before this can be component-scoped.
Effect/shadow color on avatar more button. No avatar/* effect token published. Needs new token design decision before this can be component-scoped.
Structural component-set canvas fill, not production UI. Skip per global rules.
Non-standard local variable (VariableCollectionId:2027:400 / VariableID:654:8257) with the name focus/base. Cannot replace without publishing a tag/focus/ring component token.
Same focus/base non-standard local variable exception as Tag / Interactive.
Foundation/special text color on Phone Number text node. Intentional design decision; no avatar/* text token defined to replace it.
Effect color on destruction/focus variant. No icon-button/* effect/shadow token confirmed. Structural focus treatment.

logo/google instance (40× across all variants) has a raw white fill acting as the brand logo pill background. Cannot bind to a component token without breaking Google logo rendering. Intentional brand-artwork exception.
Provider logo artwork nodes (Google, Facebook, Apple) carry brand-mandated fill colors. Button shell uses system tokens; only logo artwork nodes are raw. Intentional brand-artwork exception.
Inherits raw logo artwork fills from Button Social instances. Same brand-artwork exception applies.

_gridNote: Grid component (node 6673:83) is a layout template showing column guides. Column fills/strokes were bound to container/neutral/default and border/subtle respectively. This is correct — the guide color IS production chrome that should respect the theme.
_cardNumberNote: TextField/CardNumber contains 40 instances of logo/google (one per variant). Each instance has a raw white fill (r=1,g=1,b=1) that acts as the white pill/badge background for the Google brand logo artwork. This fill cannot be replaced with a component token without breaking the brand logo rendering. Accepted as intentional brand-artwork exception.
_buttonSocialNote: Button Social and Button Social Group contain provider logo artwork (Google, Facebook, Apple). White and brand-color fills on logo artwork nodes are intentional brand exceptions. Button shell/background/border must use system tokens; only provider logo nodes are excepted.
